python3 -c "
import json, os
d = '/home/andysag/.claude/projects/-home-andysag-Desktop-pelikan-alakol-site-v2/memory'
out = []
for f in ['roadmap.md', 'review_bar_html.md']:

        content = open(os.path.join(d, f)).read()
        out.append('=== ' + f + ' ===\n' + content)
    except:
        pass
ctx = '\n\n'.join(out)
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
"
